title: Tome III Act 5: Aletheia, the Bright Medium

# 📖 Tome III Act 5: Aletheia, the Bright Medium
**act** · shared · narrative

Aletheia 🔮 named explicitly as the bright-medium cosmological figure (Protection+Connection+Computation). V38 bit-pattern named in cosmological register.
